problem: How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale?
hypothesis: If Phytoremediation with hyperaccumulator plant species is applied to rapidly, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Life cycle assessment with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
